meta.title: DEF CON 33 - BiC Village  -  B I C  Pick   DEF CON 33 Badge Walkthrough - Eli McRae
meta.description: Join us for a guided walkthrough of the Blacks in Cybersecurity Village (BIC) badge from DEF CON 33, led by the badge’s developer. Explore the PCB design, embedded circuits, and how this year’s badge supports SAOs.
